name: astro-cloudflare-landing-page-template
description: Launch a landing page on Astro and Cloudflare Workers with a D1-backed signup form.

scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && node ./scripts/astro-cli.mjs build
scripts.check: npm run build && node ./node_modules/typescript/lib/tsc.js --noEmit && node ./node_modules/wrangler/bin/wrangler.js deploy --dry-run
